TRAINED SPOTTER SIGHTED TORNADO TOUCHDOWN AT 635 CDT. DURATION 12 MINUTES.

TORNADO ON THE GROUND ABOUT 12 MINUTES MOVING EAST ALONG AND CLOSE TO THE SLOPE/BILLINGS LINE. LAW ENFORCEMENT HAD NO REPORTS OF DAMAGE. TORNADO WAS VISIBLE FROM AS FAR AWAY AS BEACH...35 MILES. IT WAS DETERMINED THAT AT LEAST 6 OBSERVERS...FROM DIFFERENT LOCATIONS...WERE ALL SEEING THE SAME TORNADO. IT WAS PRODUCED BY A VERY HIGH BASED THUNDERSTORM. EYEWITNESSES AND PHOTOS SHOW SOME DISTANCE BETWEEN WHERE THE TORNADO CAME OUT OF THE STORM AND WHERE IT TOUCHED DOWN.
